@startuml
' Skin parameters for better readability
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
    BackgroundColor White
    BorderColor Black
}
left to right direction

' Define classes
class Customer {
    -customerId: String
    -name: String
    -address: String
    -phone: String
    -email: String
    +getProfile(): void
}

class Broker {
    -brokerId: String
    -name: String
    -expertise: String
    +assessProfile(): boolean
    +makeOffer(): void
}

class InsurancePolicy {
    -policyNumber: String
    -type: String
    -price: double
    -startDate: Date
    -endDate: Date
    +calculatePremium(): double
}

class Contract {
    -contractId: String
    -signatureDate: Date
    -paymentFrequency: String
    -status: String
    +sign(): void
    +generateInvoice(): void
}

class ClaimCase {
    -claimId: String
    -incidentDate: Date
    -description: String
    -status: String
    +submit(): void
    +process(): void
}

class Estimator {
    -estimatorId: String
    -name: String
    -areaOfExpertise: String
    +assessClaim(): Report
}

class Report {
    -reportId: String
    -date: Date
    -findings: String
    -recommendation: String
    +generate(): void
    +archive(): void
}

class Compensation {
    -compensationId: String
    -amount: double
    -decisionDate: Date
    -eligibleCosts: String
    +calculate(): double
    +pay(): void
}

' Define relationships
Customer "1" -- "1" Broker : assigned to
Customer "1" -- "1..*" InsurancePolicy : holds
InsurancePolicy "1" -- "1" Contract : results in
Customer "1" -- "0..*" ClaimCase : files
ClaimCase "1" -- "1..*" Estimator : assessed by
Estimator "1" -- "1..*" Report : creates
ClaimCase "1" -- "1..*" Report : has
ClaimCase "1" -- "0..1" Compensation : approved for

@enduml
